task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD main window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Open the T8_housing_bracket.FCStd model in FreeCAD.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D viewport displays a mechanical bracket, or the Model tree view shows 'T8_housing_bracket'.

task_completion.description: Determine the bounding box, volume, surface area, and center of mass of the part.
task_completion.visual_evidence: FreeCAD's Python console, measurement tools, or property panels are open and displaying geometric values (coordinates, area, volume) for the part.

task_completion.description: Write the measurements in the specified format with values rounded to 2 decimal places.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor window shows the required keys (e.g., BoundingBox_X:, Volume:) paired with numeric values formatted to two decimal places.
The text editor's title bar or a 'Save As' dialog indicates the file is named 'measurement_report.txt' and is located in the '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeCAD GUI to open the model and extract measurements.
integrity.visual_evidence: FreeCAD is visible and actively used in the screenshots, rather than the agent solely using terminal commands or background scripts to extract data.

integrity.description: The agent actually measured the properties rather than hallucinating values.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values entered in the text report match or are derived from the values seen in FreeCAD's measurement tools, python console, or property panels in previous screenshots.

integrity.description: The agent loaded the correct T8 housing bracket model.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 3D viewport shows a mechanical part with a pad, dual holes, pocket, and polar pattern, not a different or empty model.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task uses a real T8 lead screw housing bracket model (T8_housing_bracket.FCStd) containing engineering features (Pad, dual Holes, Pocket, PolarPattern). The required properties are BoundingBox_X, BoundingBox_Y, BoundingBox_Z, Volume, SurfaceArea, CenterOfMass_X, CenterOfMass_Y, CenterOfMass_Z. The report must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/measurement_report.txt. Values must be rounded to 2 decimal places. Tolerances for verification: 5% for bounding box, volume, and surface area; 2.0mm absolute for center of mass.
